name: Dazzling Captivation
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: Amid the passionate tongue-entangling kiss, sparkles suddenly dance off of [AttackerName]' dress to captivatingly flit around in a kaleidoscopic light show that keeps every ounce of [TargetName]'s focus on her {i}and only her{/i}, every breath-catching parting of their lips giving [TargetHimOrHer] the opportunity to appreciate the blinding beauty of her flawless face all the more.
miss: Amid the passionate tongue-entangling kiss, sparkles suddenly dance off of [AttackerName]' dress to captivatingly flit around in a kaleidoscopic light show, but [TargetName] manages to ignore the mesmerizing display!
statusOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Elegant Embrace|n|The stunning, attention-demanding framing of mesmerizingly flickering lights pierces through all reason in [TargetName]'s head, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] dazedly swaying in star-struck charmed bliss, moaning incoherently into the succubus' mouth while [TargetHeOrShe] just stands there and stares at [AttackerHimOrHer].
